violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Door sweep was observed, but one side of the door was not tight. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
A small amount of old rodent droppings were observed behind equipment/shelves. Employee was in process of cleaning facility of droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025

The pressure measuring device to the high temperature dish machine was observed to be in poor repair (not reading pressure). The dish machine was tested using high temperature thermo-labels and was observed to be properly sanitizing at the time of inspection. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024
The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
